{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322105125A4B4F2B6F6531B462954"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7420080687863792408","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"09-26
这本小说是书荒时候发现的，我刚阅读这部小说时，被其的真实吸引，作者不仅构建了一个栩栩如生的贴近现实的世界，而且通过细腻的心理描写和逼真的对话（如方言），让每一个角色都跃然纸上，再加上专业术语，我感觉都可以当末日指南看了）（主角不无脑，金手指不逆天）总体还是很不错，值得一看[笑]","text_exts":[{"e":50,"s":46,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741478851B462954%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227420080687863792408%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227397411348251954200%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727626529,"group_id":"7397411348251954200","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyQ1piRQc5cvV4NS8Z5xkM4gjxqRpZ49OzjRwBMPbRgR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/63106ad315184059a2a9a25da9e63afe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706842&x-signature=tEQd2n8lRVEHiXqGSY2ixmmnjAI%3D","user_id":"1460572282965431","user_name":"乐一黎么已明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1460572282965431","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7397411348251954200","book_info":{"abstract":"全球断电+高温+水旱灾害+两级冰川全部融化+海平面上升70米。主角随身空间，无系统，无变异，无丧尸。
2024年2月28日，太阳超强电磁风暴爆发，全球人类观看了史无前例的炫美极光后，惊愕的发现全球输变电系统崩坏，绝大多数电器失灵，随之而来的是持续的高温、水旱灾害频发，不到一年时间里，全球接近一半的人类遇难。本书主人公狄枫在一次泥石流中不幸腿骨骨折，在没有医疗条件的情况下，哀嚎数日，最终感染去世。似因其心有不甘，竟重生于灾变之前，还带有随身空间。且看他这次将如何扭转乾坤！
